HGSS.110.0001:
It’s my turn!
There’s no escape!\f
HGSS.110.0002:
It’s a PERSIAN statue...
Its eyes are glowing red...\f
You feel that somebody may be
watching...
HGSS.110.0003:
It’s a PERSIAN statue...
Its eyes are glowing blue...\f
You don’t feel anyone watching you...
HGSS.110.0004:
The eyes of the PERSIAN statue
are no longer glowing...
HGSS.110.0005:
A secret switch!\f
The red switch is flashing in a
suspicious manner.\r
Will you press it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.110.0006:
A secret switch!\f
The blue switch is lit.\r
Will you press it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.110.0008: The secret switch is not lit anymore...
